title: Administrative rulemaking
doc_html:
§2120.24. Administrative rulemaking

            The department shall adopt all rules and regulations in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act as necessary for the implementation of the provisions of this Part.

            Acts 2022, No. 577, §1.
doc_text:
§2120.24.  Administrative rulemaking
The department shall adopt all rules and regulations in accordance with the
Administrative Procedure Act as necessary for the implementation of the provisions of this
Part.
Acts 2022, No. 577, §1.
